def positive_sibling_modules_depend_on_private_helpers_from_each_other():
    rule_id = "sibling_modules_depend_on_private_helpers_from_each_other"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag sibling modules that reach into each other's private helpers instead of using a shared boundary."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
